headline: Charles Schwab raised approximately $1.48 billion in net proceeds through the issuance of 1.5 million depositary shares of 6.100% Series L preferred stock.
investor_impact: This $1.48 billion preferred stock issuance bolsters Schwab's regulatory capital and liquidity profile, reinforcing balance sheet strength. However, the 6.100% fixed dividend introduces a new preferred dividend obligation that will marginally reduce earnings available to common shareholders and includes standard restrictions on common stock dividends and buybacks if preferred dividends are suspended.
key_figures: 6.100% fixed-rate reset non-cumulative perpetual preferred stock, Series L
$100,000 liquidation preference per preferred share ($1,000 per Depositary Share)
